About this item

  • PERFECT FIT & PRECISE CUTOUTS: Compatible with Realme 3P – all ports, buttons, speakers & camera fully accessible with zero gap or wobble
  • CRYSTAL CLEAR ANTI-YELLOWING TPU: Premium polycarbonate keeps your Realme phone's original colour visible – stays crystal clear over months of use
  • SHOCKPROOF DROP PROTECTION: Reinforced corner bumpers + raised camera & screen lips absorb drops and prevent scratches on flat surfaces
  • SLIM, LIGHTWEIGHT & WIRELESS CHARGING READY: Ultra-thin transparent case adds zero bulk – no need to remove for wireless charging, plug & play fit
  • EXACT REPLACEMENT QUALITY: If your old case stopped working or cracked, this exact-fit Compatible with Realme 3P back cover is your instant, no-setup solution
› See more product details

Compatabile for Realme 3P Back Case Transparent

Rufus is generating a response...
    ... See more
    Sorry, something went wrong.

    Product description

    Compatible with Realme 3P – Upgrade your protection without hiding your phone's premium look. This Crystal Clear Transparent Back Case Cover is engineered specifically for the Realme 3P, delivering a snug, gap-free fit with precise cutouts for all ports, volume buttons, charging connectors, speakers, and the rear camera module. Crafted from high-quality soft TPU and polycarbonate hybrid material, the case features advanced anti-yellowing coating that keeps it crystal clear even after months of daily use. The reinforced corner bumpers absorb shock from accidental drops, while raised bezels around the screen and camera lens prevent scratches during face-down placement. Ultra-slim profile adds minimal thickness – slides smoothly in and out of pockets and bags. Wireless charging compatible – no need to remove the case. Anti-slip inner surface prevents the case from shifting during use. Perfect for users who want to showcase their phone's original colour and design while keeping it scratch-free and impact-protected every day. Q: Does this case fit Realme 3P exactly? A: Yes, this is designed exclusively for Realme 3P with precise model-specific cutouts. Q: Is any setup or pairing needed? A: No – simply snap it on for instant plug & play protection. Q: Will it turn yellow over time? A: No – the advanced anti-yellowing coating keeps it crystal clear. Q: Is this an original brand case? A: This is a high-quality compatible replacement case, not an original brand product. Q: Does it support wireless charging? A: Yes, wireless charging works without removing the case.

    How are ratings calculated?
    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Product description

    Compatible with Realme 3P – Upgrade your protection without hiding your phone's premium look. This Crystal Clear Transparent Back Case Cover is engineered specifically for the Realme 3P, delivering a snug, gap-free fit with precise cutouts for all ports, volume buttons, charging connectors, speakers, and the rear camera module. Crafted from high-quality soft TPU and polycarbonate hybrid material, the case features advanced anti-yellowing coating that keeps it crystal clear even after months of daily use. The reinforced corner bumpers absorb shock from accidental drops, while raised bezels around the screen and camera lens prevent scratches during face-down placement. Ultra-slim profile adds minimal thickness – slides smoothly in and out of pockets and bags. Wireless charging compatible – no need to remove the case. Anti-slip inner surface prevents the case from shifting during use. Perfect for users who want to showcase their phone's original colour and design while keeping it scratch-free and impact-protected every day. Q: Does this case fit Realme 3P exactly? A: Yes, this is designed exclusively for Realme 3P with precise model-specific cutouts. Q: Is any setup or pairing needed? A: No – simply snap it on for instant plug & play protection. Q: Will it turn yellow over time? A: No – the advanced anti-yellowing coating keeps it crystal clear. Q: Is this an original brand case? A: This is a high-quality compatible replacement case, not an original brand product. Q: Does it support wireless charging? A: Yes, wireless charging works without removing the case.

    Important Information

    Visible screen diagonal

    7" / 17 cm
